query:
SELECT p.slug, p.name, c.id as conn_id, c.status, c.last_sync_at, c.last_sync_status
FROM integration_providers p
JOIN integration_connections c ON c.provider_id = p.id
WHERE p.slug IN ('sec-edgar', 'finra-brokercheck');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3S2TaCfAdzc6QNm.b8cc9e16633a --database GaKEFERPH576tbv5NzvkMD --execute SELECT p.slug, p.name, c.id as conn_id, c.status, c.last_sync_at, c.last_sync_status
FROM integration_providers p
JOIN integration_connections c ON c.provider_id = p.id
WHERE p.slug IN ('sec-edgar', 'finra-brokercheck');
